title: Remove unused wire in procedural for initialization

features.name: for_loop_initialization_in_always_comb_causing_latch
features.description: Code should include a for-loop with initialization declaring loop variables, placed inside an always_comb block with conditional logic that causes latch inference for the auto-generated implicit wire
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
if (cond) begin
for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) begin
// loop body with if statement causes latch inference
end
end
end
